subject: fix(mobile): auto-scale canvas to fit above bottom sheet instead of scrolling
body:
The previous scroll approach (overflow-y-auto + dynamic paddingBottom) only
worked on initial load because ResizeObserver picked up the padding change,
recalculated previewScale, and caused dimension flicker. The canvas also
changed dimensions at full snap, which would affect exports.

New approach: previewScale now subtracts the sheet's snap height (in px) from
the available container height on mobile, so the canvas auto-shrinks to fit
the visible area above the sheet. No scrolling needed, no dimension changes
that affect the export pipeline (exports already use platform.width/height
at scale(1), not previewScale).

Tags: mobile, canvas, layout, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
title: auto-scale canvas to fit above bottom sheet instead of scrolling
